description_long: This is a green and yellow John Deere-style tractor with a robust, boxy build and a fully enclosed operator cabin. The tractor features large, deeply treaded rear tires and slightly smaller front tires, both with yellow rims, designed for traction and stability on various terrains. The cabin is equipped with large, tinted windows on all sides, side mirrors, and a roof for weather protection, as well as visible steps and handrails for easy access. The front of the tractor displays a prominent hood with vent details and headlights, while the rear includes a triangular slow-moving vehicle sign and a hitch for towing implements. The side panels show subtle branding and access panels, and there are visible exhaust and tool storage elements. The overall design is rugged, functional, and suitable for both agricultural and urban utility work.
description: A green and yellow tractor with an enclosed cabin, large rear tires, and detailed functional features, designed for heavy-duty work.
description_view_0: Front view showing the prominent hood, headlights, large front tires, and side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cabin windows, steps, handrails, and the size difference between front and rear tires.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the slow-moving vehicle sign, rear hitch, and the back window of the cabin.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cabin, exhaust, tool storage, and the overall length of the tractor.
attribute_wheel_configuration: Four wheels, larger rear wheels and smaller front wheels, likely four-wheel drive
attribute_cabin_design: Enclosed cabin with large tinted windows, side mirrors, roof, and visible steps and handrails for access; designed for operator comfort and protection.
